docs.title: Wiki Synthesis Architecture
docs.content:
Wiki Synthesis Architecture

The wiki synthesis pipeline converts raw source events into curated team knowledge pages.

## Triage stage
Events arrive in wiki_synthesis_queue. The triage stage (WikiTriageAgent) batches events in token-budget packs of up to 150K tokens and scores them 0-10. Events scoring >= 7.0 advance to synthesis.

## Synthesis stage
The wiki agent (WikiSynthesisAgent in services/wiki/agent.py) processes triaged events and writes or updates Notion-style wiki pages. It uses Gemini 3.1 Pro.

## Nightly schedule
The wiki cron fires at 02:00 UTC, waking the worker via pg_notify on wiki_synthesize_pending.

docs.title: services/wiki/agent.py
docs.content:
# services/wiki/agent.py

class WikiSynthesisAgent:
    """Gemini 3.1 Pro agent for wiki page synthesis."""
    model = WIKI_AGENT_MODEL  # gemini-3.1-pro-preview

    async def drain(self, customer_id: str) -> DrainResult:
        """Drain triaged wiki events for this customer."""
        ...

expected_edges.note: Notion architecture doc explicitly documents WikiSynthesisAgent in agent.py, describing its triage and synthesis stages
